results.title: Electric Wheelchair Market to Reach USD 13.1 Billion by 2035 as Smart Mobility Technologies Accelerate Global Adoption – SNS Insider
results.description: U.S. Electric Wheelchair Market projected to hit USD 4.26 Billion by 2035, while Europe market is forecast to reach USD 3.74 Billion amid rising geriatric population and demand for advanced mobility assistance devices U.S. Electric Wheelchair Market projected to hit USD 4.26 Billion by 2035, while Europe market is forecast to reach USD 3.74 Billion amid rising geriatric population and demand for advanced mobility assistance devices
